description: The open-source TypeScript SDK for AI agents with self-improving memory and production fundamentals built in.
rules: Eidentic is a TypeScript SDK published on npm as `eidentic` and `@eidentic/*`. Always use the TypeScript API and ESM imports.
Construct an agent with `new Agent({ id, model, store })`; wrap any AI SDK provider via `new AIModel(provider(modelId))`.
Use `@eidentic/libsql` (LibsqlStore, pure-JS) for Next.js/serverless; `@eidentic/sqlite` (SqliteStore) for Node/Bun.
`agent.query(input, { sessionId })` returns an async generator of StreamEvents; text deltas are `ev.type === 'stream.delta'` with `ev.delta.text`.
Next.js: `export const POST = withEidentic(agent)` from `@eidentic/nextjs`. React: `useEidenticStream(endpoint)` from `@eidentic/react`.
